title: helianthus mexicanus
intro: Helianthus mexicanus, also known as Mexican sunflower or Peruvian sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Helianthus mexicanus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Helianthus mexicanus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
